# Daniel Cabrera — Full-Stack Developer (Barcelona)

> Interactive portfolio and professional profile. Production web apps, high-traffic platforms, automation bots, SaaS and cybersecurity-minded engineering.

## About

- Name: Daniel Cabrera
- Role: Full-Stack Developer & Cybersecurity Enthusiast
- Location: Barcelona, Spain
- Experience: 5+ years
- Email: admin@danielcabrera.es
- GitHub: https://github.com/danikeinox
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/dcabreraa/

## Core skills

React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Firebase, Supabase, Tailwind CSS, Python, Rust, MySQL, cybersecurity, API integrations, Vercel, Cloudflare, Upstash rate limiting.

## Production projects (client work)

- Perfectos Desconocidos 2 — https://www.perfectosdesconoci2.com — Reality show voting platform (high concurrency) for influencer Natalia Palacios. Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase, Cloudflare, Upstash, Vercel.
- Carliyoelbot — https://www.carliyoelbot.com — 24/7 TikTok automation bot and website for Carlos García (@carliyoelnervio). Stack: Next.js, Firebase, GitHub Actions, Resend, Cloudflare R2.

## Personal / product projects

- Tonet Browser — https://www.usetonet.com — Desktop browser built from scratch in Rust (privacy-minded, early MVP). GitHub: https://github.com/usetonet/tonet-browser
- Businfy — SaaS for business registration in Spain (in development)
- Resuma — AI resume analysis startup (in development)
- Podgenius — AI podcast generator (in development)
